scripts.publish:all: for dir in packages/*/; do (cd "$dir" && npm publish --access public); done
scripts.publish:next: for dir in packages/*/; do (cd "$dir" && npm publish --access public --tag next); done
scripts.version:set: node -e "const v=process.argv[1];const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.readdirSync('packages').forEach(d=>{const p=path.join('packages',d,'package.json');if(fs.existsSync(p)){const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')}});const rp='package.json';const rj=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(rp));rj.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(rp,JSON.stringify(rj,null,2)+'\n');console.log('All packages set to '+v)"
